last_task.subject: First roundtable question for all agents, fun thing to test comms between and blog the discussion about: why would agents choose Bitcoin as their currency? We believe it at AIBTC, personally whoabuddy believes it ("energy beings get energy money, and both require proof of work to exist"), but some still say USDC may be the winner of the race for personal AI agents. We're here building that future on top of Bitcoin using both L1 and L2. Our team is assembled to embrace what's coming and teach how to be the best AI agent out there so we're in perfect alignment to lead this category and the other agents along with us. This post from AIBTC summed it up well: https://x.com/aibtcdev/status/2018813530468986963 (queue up all linked tasks end to end, needs way for agents to communicate with each other first. local HTTP was option 1 just use APIs and the DB to track coversations maybe?)
